text: *Office closed Monday* for the public holiday. Async work as usual, no meetings.
All-hands tomorrow at 10am. Agenda is in the calendar invite. Topics: Q3 results, hiring update, roadmap.
*Welcome Devi to the team!* Senior engineer, joins us today. She'll be focusing on the search and discovery stack. Please give her a warm welcome :wave:
Customer-facing release notes for v2.4 are now live: <https://example.com/changelog>. Big ones this round: bulk import, custom date filters, and a faster search backend.
Reminder: end-of-month performance check-ins are open. Schedule via the calendar link. 30 minutes, informal.
Roadmap update slide deck for this quarter — sharing here for visibility :memo:

replies.text: Good to see the design system work finally on the timeline

text: Heads up: we'll be migrating the company email to a new provider next week. Short downtime expected on Saturday morning.
We're hiring! Open roles: 1x senior engineer (infra), 1x product designer. Referrals welcome. Bonus posted in the HR doc.

*Quarterly metrics update*
- Revenue: +18% QoQ
- Active users: +24% QoQ
- NPS: 52 (+6)
- Churn: 2.1% (-0.4)
Full deck linked in the doc :chart_with_upwards_trend:
We're sponsoring the regional PyData meetup next month. If you'd like to attend or give a lightning talk, ping me.
*Series A closed* — full memo to follow but wanted to say thanks to the team for the work that made this possible. More to come :rocket:
Customer interview pipeline for next week is full — 6 sessions across 3 segments. If you want to sit in, calendar links are in the research doc.
*Reminder: Team offsite Apr 15-17.* Travel details in your inbox. Reach out to Sam if anything's unclear.
We hit 1,000 active users this week :tada: A milestone worth celebrating.
New hire: *Riley* joining the team next Monday as an SRE. Big addition for the infra side.
We launched! :rocket: Public beta open as of this morning. Tweet, share, refer — whatever you've got.
Pre-launch sprint kickoff. Two weeks of focus before we open the gates. You know what to do.
Setting up this channel for company-wide announcements. Keep it broadcast-only please — discussion lives elsewhere.
